text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello, I am not convinced that this is a problem. I tried to reproduce 
this but with a recent checkout (today) I cannot see this happening. 

Can you clean your environment and download from a different mirror 
and see whether this is resolved? Also note that 10.x is HEAD material 
and things get broken periodically there.
